title: Understanding Federal Grant Audits — D-RED Seminar Slides
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-02-01 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Understanding Federal Grant Audits'. Presented by Dr. Farin Kamangar (MD, PhD) and Deb Flavin, Associate Vice President, Accounting Operations & Compliance. Explains the federal Single Audit requirements, what auditors look for, common findings at universities, and how PIs and departments can prepare. Companion Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/wgCdoA3jkrQbORC3KKkmCPjVkReLfm_2RQVdSfVYqH0Kj-r5wEvzlF1dDYiduPaT.hDDCYZQR-EyNN4Hg
